title: OpenAPI Python Client
description: Generate a Python httpx client from an OpenAPI specification

openApiSpecPath.description: Path to the OpenAPI specification relative to the monorepo root

outputPath.description: Path to the directory in which to generate the client relative to the monorepo root

clientType.description: Which client flavours to emit. 'sync' emits client.gen.py using httpx.Client, 'async' emits async_client.gen.py using httpx.AsyncClient, 'both' emits both.
